short_name: Evaluating the Effect of Tranexamic Acid on the Clinical Outcomes in Patients With Traumatic Brain Injury
title: Evaluating the Effect of Tranexamic Acid on the Clinical Outcomes in Patients With Traumatic Brain Injury

skipped_criteria: Time of admission within 3 hours of injury: temporal/time-of-injury logic cannot be expressed with available schema fields.
GCS score of 3 with bilateral unresponsive pupils: the pupil response component cannot be expressed in the schema; only GCS=3 is partially encoded as a soft exclusion.
Known bleeding/clotting disorders: no schema field exists for bleeding or clotting disorder history.
Known seizure disorders: no schema field exists for seizure disorder history.
Known history of severe renal impairment: no schema field exists for renal function or history.
Unknown time of injury: temporal/time-of-injury metadata cannot be expressed with available schema fields.
Prior TXA for current injury: no schema field exists for prior medication administration.
Known venous or arterial thrombosis: no schema field exists for thrombosis history.
Intracranial haemorrhage confirmed on cranial CT scan: imaging confirmation cannot be expressed with available schema fields (presumed_intracranial_hemorrhage used as proxy).
